cluster_summaries.label: Pay & Benefits
cluster_summaries.summary: Employees frequently cite competitive salary and benefits as a primary positive aspect of their tenure.

cluster_summaries.label: Flexibility & Care
cluster_summaries.summary: Flexible scheduling and work-life balance are recognized as key contributors to a positive and inclusive work environment.

cluster_summaries.label: Growth & Recognition
cluster_summaries.summary: While some staff benefit from mentorship and clear growth paths, others report difficulty in achieving advancement.

cluster_summaries.label: Culture & Belonging
cluster_summaries.summary: The company is noted for fostering a collaborative, relaxed, and friendly team atmosphere.

cluster_summaries.label: Safety & Fairness
cluster_summaries.summary: Employees value the strong culture of safety in field roles and general job security, though management quality varies.

cluster_summaries.label: Burnout & Workload
cluster_summaries.summary: Some employees report exhaustion and frustration with the pace of work and difficulties in securing pay raises.

cluster_summaries.label: Stagnation
cluster_summaries.summary: A subset of the workforce feels overlooked, citing a lack of mentorship and limited opportunities for career progression.

cluster_summaries.label: Work-Life Pressure
cluster_summaries.summary: Demanding project requirements and long hours can lead to significant stress and difficulty maintaining a healthy work-life balance.

cluster_summaries.label: Disconnected Culture
cluster_summaries.summary: Remote work and project-based isolation can sometimes lead to feelings of disconnection from the broader company culture.

cluster_summaries.label: Unsafe or Unfair Culture
cluster_summaries.summary: Reports of toxic leadership, favoritism, and discrimination highlight critical areas for improvement in management practices.
